creator: charlz_klug@mail.ru
text:
I update installed software. Emacs was updated from 23 to 24 version. After that slime does not work. I type `M-x slime' and get output:
Debugger entered: (("Error in timer" slime-attempt-connection (#<process inferior-lisp> nil 2) (void-variable --cl-accu--)))
  #[257 "\302\303\304\300\301^EF\"\207" [slime-attempt-connection (#<process inferior-lisp> nil 2) debug nil "Error in timer"] 7 "\n\n(fn DATA$
  funcall(#[257 "\302\303\304\300\301^EF\"\207" [slime-attempt-connection (#<process inferior-lisp> nil 2) debug nil "Error in timer"] 7 "\n\n$
  slime-timer-call(slime-attempt-connection #<process inferior-lisp> nil 2)
  apply(slime-timer-call (slime-attempt-connection #<process inferior-lisp> nil 2))
  byte-code("r\301^H\302H^H\303H\"\210)\301\207" [timer apply 5 6] 4)
  timer-event-handler([t 20807 10252 313456 0.3 slime-timer-call (slime-attempt-connection #<process inferior-lisp> nil 2) nil])

How-To-Repeat: Install emacs-24 and type `M-x slime'.
